top_signals.title: Is Libya Quietly Becoming the Biggest Oil Prize the West Can’t Afford to Ignore?
top_signals.summary: At around the same time as OPEC raised its long-term oil demand forecast for the third consecutive year — now expecting global consumption to rise 19 million barrels per day (bpd), or 18%, by 2050 — Libya’s state-owned National Oil Corporation (NOC) announced that the country’s oil production is now at the highest level in 13 years. Its current 1.487 million bpd crude output is just a whisker away from the NOC’s short-term strategy of producing 1.5 million bpd of oil, which opens the way for the long-term strategic…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Owners Keep Sending Oil Tankers Through Hormuz After Attacks
top_signals.summary: Oil tankers continued navigating the Strait of Hormuz, despite a pair of attacks over the past several days that made some owners more cautious about navigating the world’s top maritime chokepoint.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Mexico Exchange Resumes Trading After Hours-Long Halt
top_signals.summary: Mexico’s BMV Group has resumed trading at the country’s main exchange after an hours-long outage that was its biggest in years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BNY and Circle expand partnership, adding mint and burn capabilities for USDC
top_signals.summary: BNY, the world's largest custodian bank, said it plans to add support for additional stablecoin via its Digital Asset Custody platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Soaring US Equity Funding Costs Risk Spilling Over to Repo Rates
top_signals.summary: US equity financing needs have been building up and risk crowding out capacity in bank dealers’ balance sheets, which in turn could boost short-term interest rates even amid limited quarter-end pressures.

top_signals.title: Mexico Central Bank Adds Bond-Buying Tool to Support Liquidity
top_signals.summary: Mexico’s central bank published regulations allowing it to buy some local government securities to boost money-market liquidity if needed, a possible preemptive move to help the regulator step in if investors are forced to sell Mexican assets.

top_signals.title: Rakuten-led group set for subsidies to build Japan's answer to Starlink
